bullets: React single-page app built with Vite and TypeScript
Uses Redux Toolkit to manage global state and RTK Query for server data
Features a social feed with posts, users, reactions, and notifications
Runs against an in-browser mock server powered by Mock Service Worker (MSW)
Delivers real-time notifications via a websocket connection managed by the RTK Query lifecycle
Routes the app with react-router-dom and gates protected pages behind a simple username-based login
